facts.explanation: 臍 (へそ) — navel. Part of speech: noun. Also: belly button, protrusion or depression in the middle of an object, center, centre, most important part, main point

facts.quizQuestion: What does "諄い" (くどい) mean?
facts.explanation: 諄い (くどい) — repetitious. Part of speech: adjective. Also: long-winded, tedious, wordy, verbose, insistent, importunate, heavy (taste), (overly) rich, strong, cloying, gaudy (colour, design, etc.), loud

facts.quizQuestion: What does "躊躇う" (ためらう) mean?
facts.explanation: 躊躇う (ためらう) — to hesitate. Part of speech: verb. Also: to waver

facts.quizQuestion: What does "躓く" (つまずく) mean?
facts.explanation: 躓く (つまずく) — to trip (over). Part of speech: verb. Also: to stumble, to fail, to suffer a setback

facts.quizQuestion: What does "頷く" (うなずく) mean?
facts.explanation: 頷く (うなずく) — to nod. Part of speech: verb. Also: to bow one's head in assent, to agree

facts.quizQuestion: What does "饂飩" (うどん) mean?
facts.explanation: 饂飩 (うどん) — udon. Part of speech: noun. Also: thick Japanese wheat noodles

questionTemplates.questionFormat: Which word is closest in meaning to '{targetLanguageWord}'?
